SendMessageResponse.SendMessageResult: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><TransferMessage xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/messaging/v1"><Header><MessageType>TransferStatusResponse</MessageType><TransferDate>2024-07-29T01:00:13.5626176+03:00</TransferDate><TransferGUID>cbd778c575834c178e89ed5ee05930ed</TransferGUID></Header><Body><TransferStatusResponse><TransferGUID>{1655c6a9-a1a6-4ada-8257-18f69d4840e1}</TransferGUID><ResponseDescription>Успешно добавени 194 записa във входящ регистър , Грешка при добавяне на запис в Изходящ регистър at System.Data.Entity.Internal.InternalContext.SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken) at System.Data.Entity.Internal.LazyInternalContext.SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken) at System.Data.Entity.DbContext.SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken) at ISSIService.TransferService.<ProcessOutgoingRegAsync>d__12.MoveNext() in E:\CielaTeams\ISSI\Apps\AppsV2\ISSIApp\ISSIService\TransferService.svc.cs:line 639 , Грешка при добавяне на запис в дневник на извършените действия at System.Data.Entity.Internal.InternalContext.SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken) at System.Data.Entity.Internal.LazyInternalContext.SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken) at System.Data.Entity.DbContext.SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken) at ISSIService.TransferService.<ProcessActionRegAsync>d__13.MoveNext() in E:\CielaTeams\ISSI\Apps\AppsV2\ISSIApp\ISSIService\TransferService.svc.cs:line 847 , Липсват данни за актуализация на регистър на заведените дела</ResponseDescription></TransferStatusResponse></Body></TransferMessage>
